title: Dividend Income Update May 2023

title: Air Products (APD) to Feature Industrial Gases at PowderMet

title: Air Products to Showcase Industrial Gas Solutions at the PowderMet2023 International Conference on Powder Metallurgy and Particulate Materials
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , June 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD) will showcase industrial gas solutions and technologies for metals and materials processing applications at the PowderMet 2023 International Conference on Powder Metallurgy and Particulate Materials from June 19-20 at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas, Nevada.

title: Air Products (APD) Selected to Enhance Qatargas' LNG Production
text: Air Products (APD) technology is set to be used by Qatargas in its LNG project, boosting capacity and advancing technology in Qatar's Ras Laffan.

title: Air Products Publishes 2023 Sustainability Report - "Sustainability in Action"
text: Report Highlights Air Products' Sustainability Goals and World-Scale Clean Energy Projects to Accelerate the Energy Transition LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , June 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD) published its 2023 Sustainability Report today – "Sustainability in Action" – detailing the Company's sustainability goals, showcasing several world-scale projects, the role clean hydrogen will play in the energy transition, and highlighting how its industrial gases and expertise help customers reduce their environmental impact.

title: Nicholas Ward's Dividend Growth Portfolio: April And May Review
text: My passive income stream increased by 25.59% YoY in April 2023 and 40.02% YoY in May 2023, with a year-to-date growth of 29.99%. I have been taking advantage of high yields on money market funds and short-term treasury ETFs, transitioning about 6.5% of my total portfolio value from a 0% yield into a high-yielding position. I have been making selective reinvestments and trades to increase my passive income stream and accelerate my journey towards financial freedom.

title: 3 Sustainable Stocks to Snap Up Before They Skyrocket

title: Air Products' AP-X® LNG Technology and Equipment Selected for the North Field South Project
text: Air Products has Supplied Key Equipment and Technology for All of Qatar's Existing LNG Trains Operating in Ras Laffan Since 1996 LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , June 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD), the world's leader in liquefied natural gas (LNG) technology and equipment, has been selected to provide its proprietary AP-X® LNG Process technology and equipment to Qatargas for the North Field South (NFS) Project in Ras Laffan, the State of Qatar.

title: Air Products And Chemicals Participates In The Hydrogen Revolution But At High Price
text: Air Products and Chemicals is a unique and reliable company in the basic materials sector, with solid fundamentals and growth opportunities in hydrogen and LNG. The company faces risks such as competition from oil and gas supermajors, higher interest rates affecting investments, and a lack of margin of safety in its current valuation. Because of the risks, Air Products and Chemicals is considered a HOLD, with potential interest for investors if the P/E ratio reaches around 20.
